name: Cawl Cennin
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the leeks thoroughly, chop them roughly, and set a little of the green aside for garnish.
2. Melt the butter and cook the vegetables (onion and celery) under cover without browning them.
3. Add the mutton stock, bring to a boil, and simmer for 1 hour, skimming if necessary.
4. Remove from heat, then rub or blend the soup through a sieve.
5. Reheat the soup, stir in the parsley, green of leeks (if used), and diced meat (if used). Season with salt and pepper.
6. Stir in the double cream, correct seasoning, and serve with sippets.
British Cookery (BTA, BFPC)
